name: Nashville City Government Host

securitySheaf.label: Probe IC
securitySheaf.effect: A stern inspector checks forms, credentials, and routing slips.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble IC
securitySheaf.effect: Records reshuffle into wrong windows and misfiled archive stacks.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: A procedural trace follows the icon through department routing.

securitySheaf.label: Tar Baby IC
securitySheaf.effect: Permit forms and violation notices try to trap the icon in bureaucracy.

sculpting: Downtown civic complex: marble lobbies, directory kiosks, brass plaques, fluorescent back offices, records vaults, filing caverns, and red NOTICE OF VIOLATION overlays.
notes: Municipal civil-administration host for permits, utilities, records, planning, public works, payroll, and sprawling bureaucracy.

nodes.title: Civic Login Kiosk
nodes.description: A city-seal kiosk waits in a marble lobby. The directory offers too many departments and not enough helpful signs.

choices.label: Log on with valid or lightly spoofed credentials
Browse public civic records from outside

nodes.title: Public Records Lobby
nodes.description: Directory kiosks, service windows, and public forms lead toward permits, licensing, tax records, and committee minutes.

choices.label: Locate buried permit or utility data
Reach protected employee or meeting archives

nodes.title: Records Basement
nodes.description: Filing caverns and microfilm archives store permits, inspections, zoning decisions, and forgotten public-works paper trails.

choices.label: Pull a useful permit or zoning lead

nodes.title: Fluorescent Back Office Counter
nodes.description: Employee records, meeting archives, interdepartment mail, and routing chains sit behind flickering lights and bored procedural guardians.

choices.label: Copy protected records for the run
Edit or suppress a protected record

nodes.title: Red Stamp Edit Window
nodes.description: A protected form waits under a huge red stamp. Any edit will echo through approvals, denials, and violation notices.

nodes.title: Utility Routing Panel
nodes.description: Water, power, service interruption, and public-works hooks hide behind department-by-committee permissions architecture.

nodes.title: Case File Cache
nodes.description: You have a usable civic lead: permits, land use, shell contractors, utilities, event approvals, or a useful suppressed record.

choices.label: Log off through normal civic traffic

nodes.title: Service Window Exit
nodes.description: The host stamps your departure as routine traffic and the marble lobby fades back into the downtown grid.
